title: [kimi-review] 7e34aa1: [SEVERITY: medium] **Close reason is unverifiable and self-r
description:
Commit: 7e34aa1a0
Message: fix(node): add bounds check for OSCORE PIV extraction

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] **Close reason is unverifiable and self-referential.** The `close_reason` states "Already in code. Commit recorded." — i.e., the fix is asserted to pre-exist, with no commit hash referencing where it was added, no test demonstrating the malformed-input case, and no evidence of verification. A security fix closing itself with "already fixed, trust me" defeats auditability. The reviewer cannot confirm `oscore_opt.len() < 1 + piv_len` actually exists at secure.rs:194.
